summary: High‑fidelity audience recording praised for its deep, rich sound; no specific show details available
review: Reviewers hail this front‑of‑house (FOB) capture as the go‑to audience source, noting its deeper, richer tonal quality compared with other pulls like the Gidley Nak 300. The audio is described as clear and immersive, making it an excellent listening experience despite the lack of commentary on the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately detailed review (4 stars) focuses on recording quality; no show information limits confidence in overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as deeper and richer than other audience pulls; considered the best available audience source by reviewer.
